summary: The required paper draft is missing, so the submission cannot be reviewed end-to-end as requested. Upstream validation artifacts are present, but without PAPER.tex there is no basis to assess framing, claims, citations, structure, or LaTeX in the manuscript itself.

issues.problem: PAPER.tex is missing or unreadable. The critique pass requires reading the draft manuscript end-to-end, but the paper directory contains only neurips_2026.sty and no TeX source file.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide a readable PAPER.tex at the specified path, then rerun the critique pass so the manuscript can be checked against the upstream artifacts and research-eval files.
